title: SDF Meta
description: Normative schema for meta.json inside an SDF file. Version: 0.1.

sdf_version.description: SDF spec version this file was produced against. Format: MAJOR.MINOR (e.g. '0.1').

document_id.description: UUID v4. Globally unique identifier for this document instance. MUST NOT change across re-exports.

issuer.description: Name or unique identifier of the producing entity.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this SDF file was produced.

document_version.description: Version of this document if it has been amended. Semver string (e.g. '1.0.0').

issuer_id.description: Machine-readable identifier for the issuer (e.g. GLN, VAT ID, UUID, government entity code).

recipient.description: Name or identifier of the intended recipient.

schema_id.description: URI of the schema.json $id. Allows external validation without unpacking the archive.

signature_algorithm.description: Algorithm used for signature.sig. Reserved for Phase 4. Set to null as forward-compatibility marker.

parent_document_id.description: UUID of the document this file amends or supersedes.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp after which the document should be considered stale.

tags.description: Free-form tags for routing or categorisation.
